title: Assistant Store Manager - Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd!
